oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Nutrition 101 – Diagnostic tools, reading a feed tag
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Schcolnik, Enrique
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: All feeds, whether in bulk or bagged, should be delivered to dairies with a feed tag. If the feed is bagged, the feed tag will be attached to each bag. If the feed is delivered in bulk, the deliv­ery slip should have a feed tag stapled to it. Typically, the bulk feed tag will be located in the scale house or in a mailbox by the commodity bays in the feedyard.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 186
